options.content:
See Individual Transfers for $Organization

Transfers by Organization
  • This dashboard shows top file transfers with the specified organization as the source or destination.
  • Select an organization from the list above, or start typing the name of the specific organization since the dropdown menu will only show 1000 results at a time.
  • Click on the name of an institution in one of the tables to go to the individual transfer dashboard for that institution.
  • All times are displayed in browser local time.
